# opnsense_trafficshaper_rule (Resource)

Manages a traffic shaper rule on OPNsense.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `interface` (String) Interface to match.
- `protocol` (String) Protocol to match (e.g. ip, tcp, udp).
- `sequence` (Number) Rule evaluation order.
- `target` (String) UUID of the target pipe or queue.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description.
- `destination` (String) Destination network/host.
- `destination_not` (Boolean) Invert the destination match.
- `destination_port` (String) Destination port (empty = any).
- `direction` (String) Traffic direction (empty = both).
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether this rule is enabled.
- `source` (String) Source network/host.
- `source_not` (Boolean) Invert the source match.
- `source_port` (String) Source port (empty = any).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Resource identifier.
